channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: 19th Sunday of Pentecost
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: 19th Sunday of Pentecost

item.title: 19th Sunday of Pentecost, "As ye would that men should do to you, do ye also to them likewise.", 2008-10-26
item.description: :19th Sunday of Pentecost. "As ye would that men should do to you, do ye also to them likewise.", 2008-10-26
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :19th Sunday of Pentecost. "As ye would that men should do to you, do ye also to them likewise.", 2008-10-26

item.title: 19th Sunday of Pentecost, The Golden Rule, Ye Shall Be The Children Of The Highest, 2009-10-18
item.description: :19th Sunday of Pentecost. The "Golden Rule" is explained, including a mention of how the world twists this rule into a sort of magical "law of attraction". The REASON for the golden rule and everything we do is because we are "children of the highest".
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :19th Sunday of Pentecost. The "Golden Rule" is explained, including a mention of how the world twists this rule into a sort of magical "law of attraction". The REASON for the golden rule and everything we do is because we are "children of the highest".
